home.title: Welcome to Blackbox
home.description: A sandbox environment for rendering research, motion systems and interactive prototypes. Each module represents a technical dimension of the Blackbox ecosystem.

tools.title: Applied Tools
tools.description: Practical utilities designed to solve real development problems. Each tool focuses on usability, clarity and engineering quality.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence Systems
ai.description: This module explores structured AI integration, streaming pipelines, memory systems and retrieval-based architectures. Intelligence is treated as a system layer, not a feature.

systems.title: Backend Architecture
systems.description: Backend architecture, secure authentication flows and structured service layers. This section demonstrates system-level thinking, not just CRUD applications.

experiments.title: Research & Exploration
experiments.description: A controlled environment for rendering research, motion systems and interactive prototypes. Each entry represents a technical study.

miniGames.title: Interactive Playground
miniGames.description: A collection of Unity WebGL prototypes demonstrating interactive mechanics and real-time physics.

uiux.title: User Experience & Design
uiux.description: Human centered interfaces, structured user flows and intentional interaction design. This section demonstrates experience architecture, motion logic and visual systems.
